entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary crop being studied for resistance to the spotted stem borer

entities.name: SPOTTED STEM BORER
entities.description: The pest Chilo partellus that attacks sorghum

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum and its wild relatives to withstand attack by the spotted stem borer

entities.name: HETEROSORGHUM
entities.description: A wild relative of sorghum, specifically Sorghum laxiflorum

entities.name: PARA-SORGHUM
entities.description: A group of wild sorghum relatives including S. australiense, S. purpureo-sericeum, S. versicolor, S. matarankense, S. timorense, S. brevicallosum, and S. nitidum

entities.name: STIPOSORGHUM
entities.description: A group of wild sorghum relatives including S. angustum, S. ecarinatum, S. extans, S. intrans, S. interjectum, and S. stipoideum

entities.name: CHAETOSORGHUM
entities.description: A wild relative of sorghum, specifically S. macrospermum

entities.name: EU-SORGHUM
entities.description: A group of sorghum accessions showing maximum susceptibility to the pest

entities.name: IS 2205
entities.description: A resistant control accession of sorghum

entities.name: NO-CHOICE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Experimental conditions where the pest has no alternative host for egg laying

entities.name: OVIPOSITION
entities.description: The process of egg laying by the spotted stem borer on the host plant

entities.name: LEAF-FEEDING
entities.description: The act of larvae feeding on the leaves of the plant

entities.name: DEADHEART FORMATION
entities.description: The death of the central leaf of the plant caused by stem borer larvae

entities.name: LARVAL RECOVERY
entities.description: The ability to recover larvae from the plant tissues after attack

entities.name: ADULT EMERGENCE
entities.description: The successful development and emergence of larvae into adult moths

entities.name: ANTIXENOSIS
entities.description: A mechanism of resistance where the plant is non-attractive to the pest

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS
entities.description: A mechanism of resistance that adversely affects the survival or reproduction of the pest
